items.name_cn: Chanel/women's bag

items.name_en: 《Export Product》Milk White! Large OHANEL 25B Affinity Duma Backpack. The hottest one is definitely Duma, super high popularity 🆙, finally a classic return in the 25B series 🌟🌟. The zipper pull tab and leather drawstring feature classic quilted elements. The material is still calfskin, black and gold colorway is versatile and premium √. The leather is glossy and shiny 👅👅, and it's wear-resistant, so you don't need to worry too much about using it. The bag shape is compact and sharp! Casual and stylish when worn, practical and cute! The capacity is completely sufficient for commuting or travel. Dimensions: 25x22.5x15cm

items.name_cn:
Genuine Grade, High Version
This miniature Toujours vertical handbag is a new arrival from the 2025 Fall Collection, stylish and practical. Crafted from black calfskin, it features oversized quilted stitching. The spacious internal compartment can hold various daily items. It features a slender leather drawstring closure for secure storage, and a light gold-finished metal CD Lock letter D turn-button clasp on the adjustable sides to elevate the style. The top leather handle comes with a detachable leather shoulder strap, allowing you to carry it by hand, on the shoulder, or crossbody.
Model 2834
Dimensions 13×15×12cm

Premium quality, high version
This miniature Toujours vertical handbag is a new arrival from the 2025 Fall/Winter collection, stylish and practical. Crafted from pink calfskin, it features oversized woven quilting stitching and a spacious interior compartment for various daily essentials. It features a slim leather strap closure for secure storage, along with a light gold-finished metal CD Lock letter D turn-knob clasp. The adjustable sides enhance its elegance. The top leather handle is paired with a detachable leather shoulder strap, allowing for hand-carry, shoulder, or crossbody wear.
Model 2834
Dimensions 13×15×12cm

items.name_cn:
Premium quality, high version
DIOR❤️TOUJOURS Handbag [Black Small]
This Dior Toujours handbag made its debut at the Fall/Winter 2023 show, featuring a unique, casual, and practical design. Crafted from black calfskin, it features oversized woven quilting stitching. The spacious interior compartment includes a small pocket for neatly organizing daily essentials. It features a CD Lock letter D turn-knob closure and adjustable sides to enhance its elegance. The leather handle has adjustable details for easy hand-carry.
 CD Lock and strap closure
 Dior charm
 Removable inner pocket
 Adjustable leather handle
 Includes dust bag
Model: 2822
Dimensions: 23x15x15cm

items.name_cn:
Premium grade, high version
This Dior Toujours vertical bag is stylish and practical, with a unique design. Crafted from black calfskin, it features oversized woven quilting stitching and a spacious interior compartment for various daily essentials. It features a slim leather tie closure for secure storage, along with a CD Lock letter D turn-knob clasp that adjusts on both sides to elevate the style. Medium size, with a top leather handle and a detachable leather shoulder strap, allowing for hand-carry, shoulder carry, or crossbody wear.
Material: Calfskin
Lining: Calfskin
Double opening design: Slim tie and Christian Dior Paris tie with CD Lock clasp
D.I.O.R. charm
Interior card slot
Top leather handle
Detachable leather shoulder strap
Dimensions: 23 x 24 x 16CM
Model: M2836
